verses.text: For Zion's sake God will not rest until her righteousness shines forth; she shall bear 'a new name' and be 'a crown of glory in the hand of the LORD.' He is zealous for her honour. God will not stop until His people's salvation is openly displayed.

For Zion's sake God will not rest until her righteousness shines forth; she shall bear 'a new name' and be 'a crown of glory in the hand of the LORD.' He is zealous for her honour. God will not stop until His people's salvation is openly displayed.

For Zion's sake God will not rest until her righteousness shines forth; she shall bear 'a new name' and be 'a crown of glory in the hand of the LORD.' He is zealous for her honour. God will not stop until His people's salvation is openly displayed.

No longer 'Forsaken,' she shall be called Hephzibah (My delight) and her land Beulah (Married); 'as the bridegroom rejoiceth over the bride, so shall thy God rejoice over thee.' God delights in His people. He weds them to Himself with joy.

No longer 'Forsaken,' she shall be called Hephzibah (My delight) and her land Beulah (Married); 'as the bridegroom rejoiceth over the bride, so shall thy God rejoice over thee.' God delights in His people. He weds them to Himself with joy.
He sets watchmen on her walls who 'give him no rest, till he establish... Jerusalem.' Persistent prayer is commanded. God invites His people to keep pleading until His promises are fulfilled.
He sets watchmen on her walls who 'give him no rest, till he establish... Jerusalem.' Persistent prayer is commanded. God invites His people to keep pleading until His promises are fulfilled.
The LORD swears that enemies shall no more devour her harvest; those who labour shall eat and praise Him. Security is promised. The fruit of their work shall be enjoyed in peace and thanksgiving.
The LORD swears that enemies shall no more devour her harvest; those who labour shall eat and praise Him. Security is promised. The fruit of their work shall be enjoyed in peace and thanksgiving.

'Go through the gates; prepare ye the way... lift up a standard,' for they shall be called 'The holy people, The redeemed of the LORD.' The way home is opened. God's people are given a new and honoured name.

'Go through the gates; prepare ye the way... lift up a standard,' for they shall be called 'The holy people, The redeemed of the LORD.' The way home is opened. God's people are given a new and honoured name.
